case_title: MICHAEL AUSTIN VS. B & B MARBLE, INC.

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AUSTIN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT B & B MARBLE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT B & B MARBLE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT B & B MARBLE, INC. $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,430.00, TO THE EXTENT THAT PLAINTIFF HAS RECEIVED CREDIT ON HIS CREDIT CARD FOR A CHARGE BACK, DEFENDANT MAY CREDIT THE CHARGE BACK AMOUNT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (THE FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED NOV-07-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT B & B MARBLE, INC.
